When uchcha planet occupies a Kendra either from the ascendant
or the Moon. the person is certain to reach a very high position. Only
one planet of uchcha kind can give the best position. The priority of
amsa of planets is very important to assess the strength and weakness
of the pla~~ets. Planets In uchcha or moolatrikona may be called mighty
planets.

Navamsa: The importance of Navamsa cannot be neglected in
judging the strength of the planets. The theory of Navamsa is formulated
by making nine divisions of 3'20' eaCh out of 30 amsas of a Rasi. These
nine divisions are allotted to the first nine Rasis and then Capricom
statts from Taurus; Aquarius and Pisces follow accordingly.
